apple.summary: €50M (€5M × 10 weeks) ACM fine (Jan-Apr 2022) on Apple for not complying with order to let Dutch dating apps use alternative payment methods.

amazon.summary: ACM opened DSA / consumer-protection investigation (2023) into Amazon's Dutch website for Prime cancellation patterns.

booking-holdings.summary: ACM market investigation (2024) — Booking.com price-parity clauses under scrutiny; Booking voluntarily dropped Dutch parity clauses.
